reviews.review_title: Got me intrigued about the full game
reviews.review_description: I enjoyed the demo and would like to see the full story I just don’t fancy having to watch all the stuff from the demo again. I Suppose I’ll have to but maybe in a couple weeks or so

reviews.review_title: A really nice taste of the full game!
reviews.review_description:
This is a really nice demo!

Per my estimates I took close to an hour to go through it, which is a lot more than most VR experiences, and the detail on the characters was amazing. (Note that there's no save so I recommend you to experience the full demo in a single go.)

The world textures could be a bit better, but I'm not sure how close we are to the limits of the Oculus GO, so I think the developer made the right choice to focus on the characters.

This changes in the full game but on this demo there's no actual gameplay or choices, you're pretty much only a spectator.

I will definitely check out the full game!

It’s a anime in first person, it’s cool and is long. The demo alone took almost an hour to complete. If the full game didn’t cost as much as it does it’d be a easy buy honestly I like the story and want to know the rest but am unsure if I’ll pay the amount wanted.
